name: Flow example
author: Carles Aubia
comment: Complete example in standard html. It does not use any framework. It is made up of a splash, authentication screen, menu, 2 screens, logout,... the basis of any program. In files low low.drawio.png is the program flow

name: Flow example with TWeb
author: Carles Aubia
comment: Complete example with TWeb framework. It is the same example as Flow example. It is made up of a splash, authentication screen, menu, 2 screens, logout,... the basis of any program. In files low low.drawio.png is the program flow

name: TWeb Browse
author: Carles Aubia
comment: Simple example of browsing management with TWeb

name: Webservices
author: Carles Aubia
comment: Webservices example. Make a step-by-step demo that you can see at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Ih_9UIT6XQ&t=3826s

name: WDO
author: Carles Aubia
comment: WDO example for dbf, mysql, sqlite3
